title: Creating cookies without the secure flag is security sensitive
description: Setting the secure flag on cookies is mandatory to prevent sensitive data from being accessed over insecure channels.
message: Setting a cookie without the secure flag.
recommendation: Set the secure flag on cookies.

noncompliant.code:
import http.cookies

session_cookie = http.cookies.SimpleCookie()
session_cookie['user'] = 'John Doe'
session_cookie.secret = '12345'
session.set_cookie(session_cookie)
noncompliant.description: Creating a session cookie without the secure flag.

compliant.code:
import http.cookies

session_cookie = http.cookies.SimpleCookie()
session_cookie['user'] = 'John Doe'
session_cookie['user'].secure = True
session_cookie.secret = '12345'
session.set_cookie(session_cookie)
compliant.description: Creating a session cookie with the secure flag.

why_is_this_an_issue: Setting the secure flag on cookies is mandatory to prevent sensitive data from being accessed over insecure channels.
how_to_fix: Set the secure flag on cookies.
